#feedbackView.raw:
background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 30% 18%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42) 36%, transparent 37%),
    linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.70), rgba(224, 242, 254, 0.46)),
    rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.40) !important

box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.12),
    0 10px 24px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.13) !important
transition: transform 170ms ease, box-shadow 170ms ease, border-color 170ms ease !important

box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.16),
    0 14px 30px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.20) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(520px 160px at 0% 0%, rgba(var(--author-rgb),0.10), transparent 72%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.42), rgba(255,255,255,0.16)) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(300px 100px at 12% 0%, var(--author-soft), transparent 74%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.34), rgba(255,255,255,0.12)) !important

box-shadow:
    0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.045),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.68),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.14) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.58), transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(34,211,238,0.84), rgba(37,99,235,0.70) 58%, rgba(99,102,241,0.62)) !important

box-shadow:
    0 14px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.09),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.82),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18) !important

box-shadow:
    var(--theme-composer-shadow),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.82),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(540px 180px at 14% 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.56), transparent 72%),
    radial-gradient(460px 160px at 98% 100%, rgba(255,255,255,0.20), transparent 74%) !important

background:
    linear-gradient(112deg, transparent 0 18%, rgba(255,255,255,0.26) 19%, transparent 33%),
    repeating-linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.045) 0 1px, transparent 1px 12px) !important

box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.78),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15),
    0 12px 26px rgba(15,23,42,0.055) !important
transition: transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, border-color .16s ease !important
transition: transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, background .16s ease !important

box-shadow:
    0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.045),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.66),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.14) !important
transition: transform .16s ease, border-color .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, background .16s ease !important

background:
    radial-gradient(680px 220px at 0% 0%, rgba(186,230,253,0.34), transparent 70%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.42), rgba(240,249,255,0.18)) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(320px 120px at 12% 0%, rgba(167,243,208,0.32), transparent 76%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(236,253,245,0.58), rgba(255,255,255,0.16)) !important

box-shadow:
    0 12px 28px rgba(16,185,129,0.10),
    inset 4px 0 0 rgba(16,185,129,0.54),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.70) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(320px 120px at 88% 0%, rgba(251,207,232,0.30), transparent 76%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(253,242,248,0.58), rgba(255,255,255,0.16)) !important

box-shadow:
    0 12px 28px rgba(219,39,119,0.09),
    inset -4px 0 0 rgba(236,72,153,0.44),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.70) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(280px 96px at 12% 0%, rgba(254,240,138,0.30), transparent 72%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,251,235,0.54), rgba(255,255,255,0.18)) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(260px 90px at 8% 0%, rgba(254,240,138,0.34), transparent 70%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,251,235,0.52), rgba(255,255,255,0.18)) !important

background:
    radial-gradient(300px 100px at 12% 0%, rgba(var(--author-rgb),0.10), transparent 74%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.34), rgba(255,255,255,0.12)) !important

box-shadow:
    0 10px 24px rgba(15,23,42,0.045),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.68),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.14) !important

.sidebar.raw:
transition:
    flex-basis var(--workspace-sidebar-duration) var(--workspace-sidebar-ease),
    width var(--workspace-sidebar-duration) var(--workspace-sidebar-ease),
    max-width var(--workspace-sidebar-duration) var(--workspace-sidebar-ease),
    opacity 180ms ease,
    border-color 180ms ease !important

transition:
      flex-basis var(--workspace-sidebar-duration) var(--workspace-sidebar-ease),
      width var(--workspace-sidebar-duration) var(--workspace-sidebar-ease),
      max-width var(--workspace-sidebar-duration) var(--workspace-sidebar-ease),
      opacity 180ms ease,
      border-color 180ms ease !important

transition:
    max-height 380ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
    opacity 220ms ease,
    transform 320ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1),
    margin 320ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) !important

background-image:
    radial-gradient(520px 420px at 64% 0%, rgba(186, 230, 253, 0.76), transparent 72%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #d9f3ff 0%, #eaf9f4 56%, #d5f8e8 100%) !important

background:
    linear-gradient(110deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30), transparent 36%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 72%, transparent),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.34), transparent 42%) !important

box-shadow:
    0 18px 38px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.74),
    inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16) !important
